content.full_text:
DIABLO CONSTRUCTION CO., INC.
4021 PORT CHICAGO HIGHWAY, P.O. BOX 4113
CONCORD, CALIFORNIA 94524-4113
(415) 671-7711

November 1, 1990

Ms. Jeanne Pritchard
Chief Technical Assistance and Analysis Division
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

RE: Request for Written Advice

Dear Ms. Pritchard:

Please accept this letter as a request for written advice from your office pursuant to Government Code section 83114 on the issues discussed below.

By way of letter, the campaign manager for a candidate for local office requested that our company, which is a general contractor, solicit individual contributions from subcontractors for the candidate's campaign. Our company is a major donor under the Political Reform Act which has already contributed the maximum amount allowed to the candidate's campaign.

We are interested in helping to solicit such contributions. However, we are concerned whether a contribution made by a subcontractor to the candidate's campaign at our suggestion or request would constitute an indirect contribution by our company, thus exceeding our allowable contribution amount, and which must be reported under the Political Reform Act.

We would appreciate receiving written advice from your office as to the following:

1. Whether any contributions made by a subcontractor at our request need to be reported by us even though the contribution is made directly to the candidate and not transmitted in any way through our office;

2. If the contribution does indeed need to be reported, how will this affect the fact that we have already contributed the maximum amount allowed to the candidate's campaign;

3. Whether the fact that the candidate requested that we solicit individual contributions have any bearing on the outcome of this issue.

Ms. Jeanne Pritchard  
Page 2  
November 1, 1990

Should you need any additional information in order to allow you to render the above requested advice, please contact the undersigned.

Sincerely,

Jeanne C. Pavao  
Corporate Counsel

JCP:kb
